structured_payload_candidate.title: Boiler Staging - Primary Only Condensing: Stage Up
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if availability, efficiency, or failsafe condition is met.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any of: (1) equipment necessary for current stage unavailable; (2) Qrequired exceeds 200% of B-STAGE MIN of next available stage for 10 minutes and hot water flowrate exceeds minimum flow setpoint of next stage; (3) HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage are unavailable. The availability condition is not subject to the minimum stage runtime requirement. Or 2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true: i. Qrequired exceeds 200% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes ii. Hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see Section 5.21.8). 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

evidence_quote: Stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage are unavailable. The availability condition is not subject to the minimum stage runtime requirement. Or 2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true: i. Qrequired exceeds 200% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes ii. Hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see Section 5.21.8). 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Boiler Staging - Non-Condensing: Stage Up
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if availability, efficiency, or failsafe condition is met.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any of: (1) equipment necessary for current stage unavailable; (2) Qrequired exceeds 90% of design capacity of current stage for 10 minutes; (3) HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage is unavailable. The availability condition is not subject to the minimum stage runtime requirement. Or 2. Efficiency Condition: Qrequired exceeds 90% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the current stage for 10 minutes; or 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Boiler Staging - Hybrid: Stage Up to Non-Condensing Stage
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If any boiler in next higher stage is non-condensing, stage up using non-condensing logic.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any boiler enabled in next higher stage is non-condensing.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage up if any: (1) availability condition; (2) Qrequired exceeds 90% of design capacity of current stage for 10 minutes; (3) failsafe condition (HW supply 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes).

Efficiency Condition: Qrequired exceeds 90% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the current stage for 10 minutes; or 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Lag Boiler Enable - Pony Boiler Transition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a smaller boiler is disabled and a larger boiler enabled, wait 5 minutes for larger boiler to prove, then shut off smaller boiler.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Stage change during which a smaller boiler is disabled and a larger boiler is enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: 1. Wait 5 minutes for the newly enabled boiler to prove that is operating correctly (not faulted as defined in Section 5.1.15.5.b.1.iii), then shut off the smaller boiler.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hybrid - Enable Lag Condensing Boiler
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a lag condensing boiler is enabled, start its primary pump, open isolation valve, then enable after 30 seconds.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. Start the next lag condensing boiler’s primary pump. b. Start the next lag condensing loop primary pump and simultaneously open the next lag boiler’s isolation valve. c. After 30 seconds, enable the lag boiler.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Secondary Hot Water Pumps - Staging by Flow Ratio
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Variable speed secondary pumps with flow meter
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage pumps based on SHWFR; start next lag when SHWFR > (number of operating pumps)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes; shut off last lag when SHWFR < (number of operating pumps -1)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. Start next lag pump when SHWFR > (Number of Operating Pumps)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes. b. Shut off last lag pump when SHWFR < (Number of Operating Pumps -1)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Start the next lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes: SHWFR > Number of Operating Pumps / (N-0.03). b. Shut off the last lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes: SHWFR < (Number of Operating Pumps -1) / (N-0.03).

evidence_quote: 5.21.7.3.  Secondary HW pumps shall be staged as a function of SHWFR, the ratio of current hot water flow,

evidence_text: 5.21.7.3.  Secondary HW pumps shall be staged as a function of SHWFR, the ratio of current hot water flow,

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Flow Bypass Valve - Setpoint Calculation
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Primary-only hot water plants with minimum flow bypass valve
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Bypass valve modulates to maintain minimum flow setpoint calculated as MinFlowRatio times sum of HW-DesFlowX for operating boilers.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. Identify boiler with highest MinFlowRatio (HW-MinFlowX / HW-DesFlowX). b. HW-MinFlowSP = MinFlowRatio * sum of HW-DesFlowX for operating boilers.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Bypass valve shall modulate to maintain minimum flow as measured by the hot water flow meter at a setpoint that provides minimum flow through all operating boilers, determined as follows: a. For the boilers operating in the stage, identify the boiler with the highest ratio, MinFlowRatio, of HW-MinFlowX to HW-DesFlowX. b. Calculate the minimum flow setpoint, HW-MinFlowSP as MinFlowRatio multiplied by the sum of HW-DesFlowX for the operating boilers.
